patterns.name: JDBC SQL Server URL with Password
Apple App Store Connect API Key ID
Android Maps API Key in local.properties
PagerDuty Events API v2 Routing Key
OpenVPN Static Key Block
patterns.regex: -----BEGIN OpenVPN Static key V1-----[\s\S]{0,800}-----END OpenVPN Static key V1-----

patterns.name: AWS IoT Greengrass Token Exchange Role
Azure IoT Edge Module SAS Token
Google Cloud IoT Device Public Key
X.509 Encrypted Private Key
patterns.regex: -----BEGIN ENCRYPTED PRIVATE KEY-----[\s\S]{0,800}-----END ENCRYPTED PRIVATE KEY-----

patterns.name: OpenSSH Private Key (OPENSSH format)
patterns.regex: -----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----[\s\S]{0,800}-----END OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----

patterns.name: PGP Private Key Block
patterns.regex: -----BEGIN PGP PRIVATE KEY BLOCK-----[\s\S]{0,800}-----END PGP PRIVATE KEY BLOCK-----

patterns.name: PGP Public Key Block
patterns.regex: -----BEGIN PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----[\s\S]{0,800}-----END PGP PUBLIC KEY BLOCK-----

patterns.name: Twilio Account SID + Auth Token Pair
Chef Client Validation Key
patterns.regex: -----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----[\s\S]{0,800}-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----

patterns.name: HL7 v2 PID Segment with DOB/SSN
